title: GovernanceConfig
description: Operator-controlled governance settings. Snapshot-able + serializable for cross-instance synchronization (e.g. team-mode rollout, B-INT-2 preflight wiring).

mode.description: Top-level governance posture per B194 enforcement-mode ladder.

l3SLAseconds.description: Time budget for L3 approval before auto-defer/expire.

l2.description: Minimum trust score to skip L2 review.

l3.description: Minimum trust score to skip L3 review.

lastUpdatedBy.description: DID of the operator who last changed this config.
